text: Market today: The average stock is having a moment while semiconductors struggle, suggesting a broader market health but a tough spot for your tech concentration. Your holdings: QQQ (-2.7%), SMH (-12.55%), SOXL (-46.77%), QQQI (-3.9%), and SPAL (-47.83%) are all marked SELL. CRWD (12.9%) and SPY (1.21%) are HOLD. Watch: The chip stock bear market news and the general market's shift away from tech. Bottom line: Focus on managing your high-conviction tech losers and the leveraged ETFs, as margin amplifies every dip.
plays: Trim QQQ and QQQI if they break their current stops.
Evaluate SMH and SOXL stops; consider reducing exposure if further downside occurs.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
